description: The Washington Post is a major American daily newspaper based in Washington D.C., founded in 1877. It is one of the most widely read English-language newspapers in the United States, covering U.S. politics, international affairs, and national security. Its journalists have faced detention and harassment in Iran; [Jason Rezaian](/people/jason-rezaian) served as the Post's Tehran bureau chief before his arrest by Iranian authorities in 2014.
editorial_notes: Jason Rezaian was Tehran bureau chief, arrested 2014, released 2016.
